# How to Evaluate Bankruptcy Attorney Reviews [2026 Guide]
> Don't trust online reviews blindly. Learn how to evaluate bankruptcy attorney ratings using court data, dismissal rates, and real metrics. 2026 guide.

## About
bankruptcyattorneyratings.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Check Your District: Bankruptcy Attorney Quality Benchmarks by Federal District: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/check-your-district.html
- Bankruptcy Attorney Fee Structures: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/fee-structures.html
- How to Research a Bankruptcy Attorney: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/how-to-research.html
- How to Evaluate Bankruptcy Attorney Reviews: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/
- Understanding Online Bankruptcy Attorney Reviews: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/online-reviews.html
- Questions to Ask a Bankruptcy Attorney Before Hiring: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/questions-to-ask.html
- Red Flags When Choosing a Bankruptcy Attorney: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/red-flags.html
- What to Expect from Your Bankruptcy Attorney: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/what-to-expect.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcyattorneyratings.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
